title: Incredibly Light Japanese Chicken Noodles
description: A light and grassy Japanese dish featuring steamed chicken and noodles, perfect for a healthy meal prep option. This recipe is dashi-friendly and can be cooked in a fondue pot.
instructions: Fill a fondue pot with dashi broth and bring to a boil.
Add the chicken to the pot and steam for 5 minutes, or until cooked through.
Add the soba noodles to the pot and cook for an additional 3 minutes, or until tender.
Stir in the grated ginger, soy sauce, and sesame oil.
Divide the noodles and chicken among four bowls.
Garnish with thinly sliced green onions and serve immediately.
Let cool, then refrigerate or freeze for up to 3 days.
Reheat in the microwave or on the stovetop before serving.
